description: Mexican criminal organization that emerged as a split from the Beltrán Leyva Cartel, founded around 2009 by Jesús Nava Romero and others. Based in Guerrero and Morelos, it engaged in drug trafficking, extortion, kidnapping, and other crimes. The group was active until around 2022, when it was dismantled.

country_links.evidence_quote: El grupo además contaba con una importante participación en el trasiego de droga hacía los Estados Unidos.
country_links.context: The organization traffics drugs to the United States.
